title: Policy and Procedures
text: Develop, document, and disseminate access control policy and procedures; review and update them at an organization-defined frequency.

title: Account Management
text: Manage system accounts, including establishing, activating, modifying, disabling, and removing accounts, and monitor their use.

title: Access Enforcement
text: Enforce approved authorizations for logical access to information and system resources in accordance with applicable access control policies.

title: Least Privilege
text: Employ the principle of least privilege, allowing only authorized accesses for users and processes that are necessary to accomplish assigned tasks.

title: Remote Access
text: Establish and document usage restrictions, configuration requirements, and implementation guidance for each type of remote access allowed.

title: Policy and Procedures
text: Develop, document, and disseminate awareness and training policy and procedures.

title: Literacy Training and Awareness
text: Provide security and privacy literacy training to system users as part of initial training and at an organization-defined frequency thereafter.

title: Role-Based Training
text: Provide role-based security and privacy training to personnel with assigned security and privacy roles and responsibilities.

title: Policy and Procedures
text: Develop, document, and disseminate audit and accountability policy and procedures.

title: Event Logging
text: Identify the types of events that the system is capable of logging and coordinate the logging function with other organizational entities.

title: Audit Record Review, Analysis, and Reporting
text: Review and analyze system audit records for indications of inappropriate or unusual activity and report findings to designated personnel.

title: Audit Record Generation
text: Provide audit record generation capability for the event types the system is capable of auditing on all components.

title: Policy and Procedures
text: Develop, document, and disseminate assessment, authorization, and monitoring policy and procedures.

title: Control Assessments
text: Select an assessor, develop an assessment plan, and assess the controls in the system and its environment of operation.

title: Plan of Action and Milestones
text: Develop and update a plan of action and milestones to document remediation of weaknesses and deficiencies found during assessments.

title: Continuous Monitoring
text: Develop and implement a continuous monitoring strategy that includes metrics, monitoring frequencies, and ongoing control assessments.

title: Policy and Procedures
text: Develop, document, and disseminate configuration management policy and procedures.

title: Baseline Configuration
text: Develop, document, and maintain a current baseline configuration of the system under configuration control.

title: Configuration Settings
text: Establish, document, and enforce configuration settings that reflect the most restrictive mode consistent with operational requirements.

title: System Component Inventory
text: Develop and maintain an accurate, complete inventory of system components.

title: Policy and Procedures
text: Develop, document, and disseminate contingency planning policy and procedures.

title: Contingency Plan
text: Develop a contingency plan that identifies essential missions, recovery objectives, and roles and responsibilities.

title: System Backup
text: Conduct backups of user-level and system-level information at an organization-defined frequency and protect their confidentiality and integrity.

title: Policy and Procedures
text: Develop, document, and disseminate identification and authentication policy and procedures.

title: Identification and Authentication (Organizational Users)
text: Uniquely identify and authenticate organizational users and associate that identity with processes acting on their behalf.

title: Authenticator Management
text: Manage system authenticators, including verifying identity, establishing initial content, and protecting authenticators from unauthorized disclosure.

title: Policy and Procedures
text: Develop, document, and disseminate incident response policy and procedures.

title: Incident Handling
text: Implement an incident handling capability that includes preparation, detection, analysis, containment, eradication, and recovery.

title: Incident Reporting
text: Require personnel to report suspected incidents to the incident response capability within an organization-defined time period.

title: Policy and Procedures
text: Develop, document, and disseminate system maintenance policy and procedures.

title: Controlled Maintenance
text: Schedule, document, and review records of maintenance, repair, and replacement of system components.

title: Policy and Procedures
text: Develop, document, and disseminate media protection policy and procedures.

title: Media Access
text: Restrict access to digital and non-digital media to authorized personnel.

title: Media Sanitization
text: Sanitize system media prior to disposal, release out of organizational control, or release for reuse.

title: Policy and Procedures
text: Develop, document, and disseminate physical and environmental protection policy and procedures.

title: Physical Access Authorizations
text: Develop, approve, and maintain a list of individuals with authorized access to the facility where the system resides.

title: Physical Access Control
text: Enforce physical access authorizations at entry and exit points to the facility where the system resides.

title: Policy and Procedures
text: Develop, document, and disseminate planning policy and procedures.

title: System Security and Privacy Plans
text: Develop security and privacy plans that describe the system boundary, environment of operation, and control implementations.

title: Security and Privacy Architectures
text: Develop security and privacy architectures that describe the requirements and approach for protecting confidentiality, integrity, and availability.

title: Policy and Procedures
text: Develop, document, and disseminate personnel security policy and procedures.

title: Personnel Screening
text: Screen individuals prior to authorizing access to the system and rescreen at an organization-defined frequency.

title: Personnel Termination
text: Upon termination of individual employment, disable system access and revoke authenticators within an organization-defined time period.

title: Policy and Procedures
text: Develop, document, and disseminate risk assessment policy and procedures.

title: Risk Assessment
text: Conduct a risk assessment, including the likelihood and magnitude of harm from unauthorized access, use, disclosure, disruption, or destruction.

title: Vulnerability Monitoring and Scanning
text: Monitor and scan for vulnerabilities in the system and hosted applications and remediate legitimate vulnerabilities in accordance with risk.

title: Policy and Procedures
text: Develop, document, and disseminate system and services acquisition policy and procedures.

title: System Development Life Cycle
text: Manage the system using an organization-defined system development life cycle that incorporates security and privacy considerations.

title: Developer Testing and Evaluation
text: Require the developer to perform security and privacy testing and evaluation and to remediate flaws identified during testing.

title: Policy and Procedures
text: Develop, document, and disseminate system and communications protection policy and procedures.

title: Boundary Protection
text: Monitor and control communications at the external managed interfaces and key internal managed interfaces of the system.

title: Transmission Confidentiality and Integrity
text: Protect the confidentiality and integrity of transmitted information using cryptographic mechanisms.

title: Cryptographic Protection
text: Determine the cryptographic uses and implement the cryptographic mechanisms required for each use in accordance with applicable standards.

title: Protection of Information at Rest
text: Protect the confidentiality and integrity of information at rest using cryptographic or alternative physical mechanisms.

title: Policy and Procedures
text: Develop, document, and disseminate system and information integrity policy and procedures.

title: Flaw Remediation
text: Identify, report, and correct system flaws, and install security-relevant updates within an organization-defined time period of release.

title: Malicious Code Protection
text: Implement malicious code protection mechanisms at system entry and exit points and update them when new releases are available.

title: System Monitoring
text: Monitor the system to detect attacks, indicators of potential attacks, and unauthorized local, network, and remote connections.
